title: Bundled Plugin Startup
objective: Validate that OpenClaw's bundled plugins load during gateway startup without missing package/module errors or degraded plugin services.

phases.title: Start Bundled Plugin Gateway
phases.intent: Start OpenClaw and let bundled plugin bootstrap run in the same shape users get from the target runtime.

phases.title: Inspect Bundled Plugins
phases.intent: List and inspect plugin registry state after startup.

phases.title: Warm Restart Bundled Plugins
phases.intent: Restart after dependency staging should be warm and verify bundled plugin services remain healthy.
